canonical_question: How do I implement OAuth2 Device Authorization flow?

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: RFC 8628 published 2019-08; no breaking changes since — protocol is stable

constraints: Polling interval MUST respect server-provided interval (default 5s) — slow_down adds 5s cumulatively
device_code expires after expires_in seconds (typically 900-1800s) — must restart flow after expiry
user_code MUST be displayed exactly as received — do not reformat or lowercase
Device flow clients are public clients — never embed client_secret in distributed apps
